title: Key stage 2 tests: 2025 scaled scores
body: "You can use these tables to convert raw scores to scaled scores for the 2025 KS2 national curriculum tests.  A scaled score between 100 and 120 shows the pupil has met the expected standard in the test. The lowest scaled score that can be awarded on a KS2 test is 80. The highest score is 120.  Pupils need to have a raw score of at least 3 marks to be awarded the minimum scaled score.  For further information, please also refer to our guidance on understanding scaled scores at KS2.  "
